pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Little or nothing up front, plus a monthly service fee for a minimum of 12 months. Any build fee is only due at delivery.

starter.name: Starter
features: Looks great on every phone and computer
Hosting and email included, domain set up for you
Small changes done for you each month

pro.name: Custom
features: Webshop, agency site, brand page, anything
Custom features built for your needs

pricing.disclaimer: Prices shown are estimates. The exact price and monthly fee are fixed in your contract before we start, with no surprises.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Short, straight answers.
faq.moreCta: Ask us. We reply within 24 hours.

cost.question: What does it cost?
cost.answer: Starter is €0 up front plus €49 a month. Business is €129 plus €75 a month. Custom from €379 plus from €125 a month. Your price is fixed in the contract before we start.

pay.question: When do I pay?
pay.answer: Nothing until you approve the finished site. Not happy? We keep adjusting, or you walk away owing nothing. The monthly fee starts at go-live.

monthly.question: What does the monthly fee cover?
monthly.answer: Hosting, email, security updates, and small text or photo changes each month. If something we built breaks, we fix it free.

domain.question: Is hosting and the domain included?
domain.answer: Hosting and email are in your monthly fee. We handle the domain for you. You only pay its small yearly registration fee, at cost. We quote that before anything is registered.

term.question: How long am I committed?
term.answer: 12 months minimum, then cancel anytime. The site stays yours. That is why you can start at €0.

speed.question: How fast will it be ready?
speed.answer: Simple sites in 1-2 days, bigger projects in 1-2 weeks. You get an exact date before we start.

google.question: Will people find me on Google?
google.answer: Yes. Your site is fast, mobile-friendly, and set up properly for search.

language.question: Can I add another language?
language.answer: Hungarian and English are included from the start. If you also want German or another language, we add a full translated version with its own pages, language switcher, and search setup. One-time project fee, agreed in your contract before we start.

tech.question: What technology do you use?
tech.answer: We build on Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, hosted on Vercel with global CDN and SSL. We picked this stack because it loads fast, stays secure, and will still be supported years from now. The same kind of setup used on serious business sites, not a drag-and-drop builder you outgrow. Starter stays lean with no database. Business adds Neon and Drizzle for bookings and customer data. Custom adds Stripe for payments. Each plan only adds what you need.

partner.question: Need a logo or physical materials?
partner.answer: Our Budapest partner SUSA STUDIO handles logo, print, and art direction. Pricing on request.

partner.name: SUSA STUDIO
partner.subtitle: Logo, print materials, and art direction from our Budapest partner studio.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it safe.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.content:
Budapest Labs (see Imprint for full business details).
Email: budapestlabs@gmail.com

collection.title: What we collect
collection.content: When you fill out our contact form, we receive: your name, email address, phone number (if you choose to share it), business name (optional), selected plan, and your message. That's it. We don't use cookies, tracking scripts, or analytics tools of any kind.

basis.title: Why we're allowed to use it
basis.content: We handle your data because you chose to send it to us. That's your consent under EU data protection law (GDPR). If we start working together, we also need your details to deliver the project. In some cases, we may keep records to meet legal or accounting requirements.

purpose.title: What we do with it
purpose.content: We use your contact details only to get back to you, put together a quote, and build your website. We will never sell, rent, or share your information with anyone for marketing or any unrelated purpose.

storage.title: How we keep it safe
storage.content: Your data is stored on encrypted servers within the European Union. Invoices and accounting records are kept for 8 years as required by Hungarian accounting law (Act C of 2000, §169). Other business correspondence and project data is kept for the duration of our working relationship, plus up to 5 years afterwards. After that, it's permanently deleted.

thirdparty.title: Services we rely on
thirdparty.content: Our website is hosted on Vercel (vercel.com), and we use Resend (resend.com) to deliver emails from our contact form. Both providers process data on our behalf under GDPR-compliant agreements. All connections use HTTPS encryption. Vercel keeps standard server logs (IP address, timestamp, page visited), which are automatically deleted after 30 days. Your information is never shared with anyone else.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.content: Under EU law (GDPR), you can: ask to see what data we have about you; correct anything that's wrong; ask us to delete your data; limit or object to how we use it; or request a copy in a portable format. You can also withdraw your consent at any time. This won't affect anything we did before the withdrawal. Just email us at budapestlabs@gmail.com and we'll get back to you within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These are the terms that apply when you work with Budapest Labs. We've kept them straightforward. No surprises.

provider.title: Service provider
provider.content:
Budapest Labs (see Imprint for full business details).
Email: budapestlabs@gmail.com

scope.title: What we do
scope.content: We design and build websites for individuals and businesses of all sizes, from portfolios and brand pages to webshops and booking platforms. Depending on your plan, this can include: custom design and development, mobile-friendly layouts, hosting and deployment, domain and email setup, multilingual support, booking systems, online payments, analytics, and more. If you need something extra, we'll discuss it and agree on it together. The exact scope of your project is based on the plan you choose and anything else we agree on in writing.

payment.title: How payment works
payment.content: The prices shown on our website are estimates. Your exact build fee and monthly service fee are fixed in an individual contract before work begins, and the contract prices are the ones that apply. The build fee is due once your website is finished and you have approved it. The monthly service fee starts on the day your site goes live and covers hosting, email, security updates, small content changes, and the lifetime warranty. The domain name is registered in your name, and its yearly registration fee is billed to you at cost. The service agreement runs for a minimum of 12 months; after that it can be cancelled anytime with 30 days' notice. We accept bank transfer, Revolut, and cash. You will receive a proper invoice for every payment, issued in accordance with Hungarian law.

revisions.title: Revisions
revisions.content: Every plan comes with one round of revisions at no extra charge. This covers adjustments to the design, layout, or text. It doesn't cover starting from scratch or adding features outside the original plan. If you'd like additional changes beyond that, we'll let you know the cost upfront. No surprises.

delivery.title: Delivery timelines
delivery.content: The timelines on our website (1-2 days, 3-5 days, 1-2 weeks) are estimates based on typical projects. How long your project takes depends on its complexity and how quickly you can send us your content. We always do our best to deliver on time, but we can't guarantee exact dates. The clock starts once we have everything we need from you (text, images, logo). If there's a delay on your side, that doesn't count against our timeline.

client.title: What we need from you
client.content: To build your website, we'll need your content: text, images, logo, and any branding materials. We also ask that you review the preview within about a week. If we don't hear back within 14 business days, we'll consider the project approved. Please also make sure the content you send us is yours to use: we trust that you have the rights to everything you provide.

ownership.title: Who owns what
ownership.content: The website is yours. If you cancel after the minimum term, we hand over everything we built for you: design, content, and code. We may use general-purpose tools and code that aren't specific to your project. We'd also love to feature your site in our portfolio, but if you'd rather we didn't, just let us know.

thirdparty.title: Third-party services
thirdparty.content: Your website may use third-party services (hosting, domain, email). We'll help set everything up, but these are independent services with their own terms.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You can walk away at any point before you approve the finished website, and you pay nothing. After the 12-month minimum term you can cancel with 30 days' notice; we hand over the complete website and help you move it wherever you like. On our side, if we don't receive your content within 30 days or can't reach you for over 30 days, we may need to close the project.

warranty.title: Lifetime warranty
warranty.content:
We stand behind our work for life. If something we built stops working as intended, we'll fix it at no cost, no matter how much time has passed. This covers bugs and defects in the code we delivered.

What's not covered: new features, design changes, content updates, or issues caused by modifications made by you or a third party. Third-party services (hosting providers, domain registrars, APIs) are outside our control.

If the underlying technology requires a significant update to keep your site functional, we'll let you know and offer a fair quote. That is separate from the warranty.

liability.title: Our responsibility
liability.content: Our liability is limited to the amount you paid for the project. We're not responsible for issues caused by changes you make after delivery, or for third-party service outages.

law.title: Legal details
law.content: These terms follow Hungarian law. If there's ever a disagreement, we'd prefer to work it out together first. Consumer complaints may also be directed to the competent conciliation body. If the dispute cannot be resolved otherwise, the Buda Central District Court or, depending on jurisdiction, the Budapest Capital Regional Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

company.title: Business information
company.content:
Révész Péter EV (sole proprietor)
Trade name: Budapest Labs

Tax number: 91808745-1-43

(Hereinafter referred to as Budapest Labs)

responsible.title: Responsible for content
responsible.content: Budapest Labs is responsible for the content of this website under applicable Hungarian and EU law.

content.title: Quality you can see at first glance.
content.p1end: It loads in a blink and looks flawless on every device.
content.p2: Under the hood you get the same engineering quality the big brands rely on: encrypted connections, 99.99% uptime, and ongoing maintenance so your site runs flawlessly for years.
content.background1: Behind Budapest Labs is a three-time founding engineer. Most recently he built a platform running on 3,000+ enterprise sites, for companies like Nvidia, Datadog, and CrowdStrike.
content.background2: Before that: healthcare and education software for US clients. Your website is built to the same standard.
